input.description: List artifacts via curl piped to python

input.command:
mkdir -p /d/mybot/release-binaries
AUTH="alice.chan@positivegrid.com:$(cat D:/mybot/git/tool/.jenkins-token)"
cd /d/mybot/release-binaries
curl -u "$AUTH" -fSL -o spark-mini-ii-fw-3.2.1.90.bin \
  "https://jk-builds.positivegrid.com/jenkins/job/SPARK_MINI_2_FW/27/artifact/Debug/spark-mini-ii-fw-3.2.1.90.bin"
echo "exit=$?"
ls -la spark-mini-ii-fw-3.2.1.90.bin
echo "sha256:"; sha256sum spark-mini-i

cd /d/mybot/release-binaries
echo "=== pre-flash list ==="
D:/mybot/git/tool/dfu-util-0.11-binaries/win64/dfu-util.exe -l 2>&1 | grep -i "295d"
echo "=== flash ==="
D:/mybot/git/tool/dfu-util-0.11-binaries/win64/dfu-util.exe \
  -s 0x90000000:leave:mass-erase:force \
  -d ",295d:0273" \
  -D spark-mini-ii-fw-3.2.1.90.bin 2>&1
echo "exit=$?"

mkdir -p /d/mybot/release-binaries/esp32-v2-8
cd /d/mybot/release-binaries/esp32-v2-8
AUTH="alice.chan@positivegrid.com:$(cat D:/mybot/git/tool/.jenkins-token)"
BASE="https://jk-builds.positivegrid.com/jenkins/job/SPARK_ESP32_FW_V2/8/artifact/build"
for f in "bootloader/bootloader.bin" "partition_table/partition-table.bin" "ota_data_initial.bin" "esp32-v2-fw-spark2-rev524.bin"; do
  out=$(basename

cd /d/mybot/release-binaries/esp32-v2-8
python - <<'PY'
import struct
data=open('partition-table.bin','rb').read()
TYPES={0:'app',1:'data'}
print(f"{'label':16} {'type':4} {'subtype':>7} {'offset':>10} {'size':>10}")
for i in range(0,len(data),32):
    e=data[i:i+32]
    if e[:2]!=b'\xAA\x50': break
    t,st=e[2],e[3]
    off,size=struct.unpack('<II',e[4:12])
    label=e[12:28].split(b'\x00')[0].d
input.description: Decode ESP32 partition table to verify offsets

input.command:
cd /d/mybot/release-binaries/esp32-v2-8
PY="C:/Users/alice/.espressif/python_env/idf5.0_py3.11_env/Scripts/python.exe"
"$PY" -m esptool --chip esp32s3 -p COM14 -b 460800 \
  --before default_reset --after hard_reset \
  write_flash --flash_mode dio --flash_freq 80m --flash_size detect \
  0x0 bootloader.bin \
  0x8000 partition-table.bin \
  0xd000 ota_data_initial.bin \
  0x10000 esp32-v2-fw-spar
